FSM_STATUS_SEVERITIES

Table for storing GUI information for severity filtering.

Columns
fss_id (`number`)

Technical key, equivalent to MESSAGE_SEVERITY.

fss_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Technical key for the class, defaults to FSM.

fss_pti_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Severity name.

fss_html (`varchar2(200 char)`)

HTML snippet, long form.

fss_icon (`varchar2(200 char)`)

HTML snippet, status icon.

Dependencies
fss_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

fss_pti_id, fss_fcl_id

references <PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM> (pti_uid, pti_upmg)
